rulings.Case Title: HEDDI CUNDLE VS. MATTEO GARBELOTTO et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 29, 2013, line 1. -PLAINTIFF HEDDI CUNDLE'S Motion For Fees And Costs. Plaintiff's Motion for Fees and Costs is granted in the amount of $9,995, $250/hour for 39.5 hours and $120 in costs. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TIMOTHY D. MURPHY VS. MICHAEL YAKOVLEVICH KLESTOFF et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 29, 2013, line 2. - DEFENDANT MARTHA DAETWYLER"S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant Daetwyler Special Motion to Strike First Amended Complaint is continued to September 12, 2013 to be heard by Honorable Harry Dorfman. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN ARMOR VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A. AS THE ORIGINATOR
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 29, 2013, line 3. -DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's Demurrer to Second Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to cause of action for negligence, Plaintiff failed to allege tender and duty of care. Onofrio, Dimock and Ansanelli are distinguishable. OVERRULED as to the debt collection acts - Complaint sufficiently alleges that Defendant is a debt collector by its own admission. See Ex 2 to SAC. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANTELOPE HALAWAN PROPERTIES, LLC VS. ABDEL KADAR CHENBOD et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 29, 2013, line 4. -PLAINTIFF ANTELOPE HALAWAN PROPERTIES' MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Moving party failed to shift burned and show that Plaintiff is entitled to a judgment as a matter of law. See Chretien v. Patients Mutual Assistance. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1506 JACKSON LLC VS. GUM GEE LEE et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 29, 2013, line 7. -DEFENDANTS GUM LEE, POON LEE AND SHIU LEES' Motion For Stay Pending Appeal. Defendant's Motion for Stay Pending Appeal is DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burned and show that hardship to Defendants outweigh irreparable injury to Plaintiffs and failed to show that such injury can be adequately compensated at the end of litigation. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DINAH BLANSON VS. APRIL BLANSON et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 29, 2013, line 5. -PLAINTIFF DINAH BLANSON'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is GRANTED, subject to opposition. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JAMES F BLANDING VS. JOSEPH R SENA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defts;
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 29, 2013, line 8. -PLAINTIFF JAMES BLANDING'S Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Responses to Discovery is OFF CALENDAR. Case Settled per Plaintiff's counsel. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BRANDON S. KAPLAN VS. MANUELA ESTEVA MARTINEZ et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, August 29, 2013, line 6. -DEFENDANTS MANUELA MARTINEZ, MARIO MARTINEZ AND IVAN GARCIAS' Motion To Quash Service Of Summons And Complaint. Defendant's Motion to Quash Service of Summons is DENIED. SFRO 37.9(i) specifically allows for an unlawful detainer action in order to challenge tenant's claim of protected status. Moving party does not cite any authority for the proposition that the Court can make a determination of protected status on a motion to quash. = (501/REQ)
